description: Layer-agnostic migration governance catalog - breaking change tracking, codemod readiness and version governance across all Design Lab layers

governanceDimensions.title: Breaking Change Tracking
governanceDimensions.description: Tum katmanlarda breaking change'lerin izlenmesi ve etki analizi

maturityLevels.label: Manual
maturityLevels.description: Breaking change'ler manuel olarak takip ediliyor

maturityLevels.label: Documented
maturityLevels.description: Breaking change'ler release notes'ta dokumante ediliyor

maturityLevels.label: Automated
maturityLevels.description: CI/CD pipeline'da otomatik breaking change detection

maturityLevels.label: Governed
maturityLevels.description: Breaking change approval workflow + blast radius analizi

governanceDimensions.title: Codemod Readiness
governanceDimensions.description: Otomatik migration script'leri ile breaking change'lerin kolaylastirilmasi

governanceDimensions.title: Version Governance
governanceDimensions.description: Semantic versioning, deprecation policy ve end-of-life yonetimi

maturityLevels.label: Automated
maturityLevels.description: Otomatik version bump + changelog + migration guide

maturityLevels.label: Manual count
maturityLevels.description: Consumer app sayisi manuel takip ediliyor

maturityLevels.label: Dependency graph
maturityLevels.description: Otomatik dependency graph + blast radius hesabi

governanceDimensions.title: Adoption Tracking
governanceDimensions.description: Yeni versiyon ve pattern'lerin ekipler tarafindan benimsenmesinin izlenmesi

maturityLevels.label: Metrics
maturityLevels.description: Otomatik adoption metrikleri (import count, usage frequency)
